steps.title: Set up the equation from the given volume formula
steps.content:
We're given that the glass volume is 473 cubic centimeters and the volume formula is $\frac{7\pi k^3}{48}$. Setting these equal:

$$\frac{7\pi k^3}{48} = 473$$

steps.title: Isolate k cubed
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 48:
$$7\pi k^3 = 473 \cdot 48 = 22,704$$

Divide both sides by $7\pi$:
$$k^3 = \frac{22,704}{7\pi} = \frac{22,704}{21.991} \approx 1,032.6$$
